title: Woody pull-string — sound box springs back to life
description: Woody’s pull string no longer fired the sound box. We repaired the spring mechanism inside the pull-string housing so phrases play when the cord is pulled.
itemDetails: Toy Story Woody pull-string dolls are licensed Pixar/Disney products, with major production by Thinkway Toys across multiple film generations. The pull-string voice format became iconic from the original 1995 Toy Story release onward. Construction usually combines a soft body with molded plastic head/hands/boots, stitched costume textiles, and an internal voice pull-cord module.
repairDetails: This Toy Story Woody pull-string doll would not pull or trigger the sound box when the cord was drawn. We repaired the spring mechanism inside the pull-string housing so the voice box triggers reliably again.
